actuarial_rationale: Power and brand are plausible severity dimensions tied to vehicle repair cost. This remains a transparent GLM, but should be rejected if the extra sparse interaction complexity is not supported by CV metrics.
description: Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to both raw and capped severity.
hypothesis: Power:Brand in capped severity was the strongest transparent pricing near miss. Adding the same repair-cost interaction to raw severity may improve raw monitoring metrics while preserving the capped gain.
